3105450.name: evidence01
3105450.description:
The following recording is the footage obtained in expedition N°██ to ██████, ████████.

Subject 0██ was instructed to obtain documents regarding ████████´s recents incidents.

Documents were kept at the Chief of Police´s Office in the local police station. Subject 0██ was adviced to be cautious and enter the police station through the alleys.

Features:


  • Total immersion in a dark and gripping story.
  • VHS-like gameplay, with realistic zoom, movement and state-of-the-art details.
  • Unveil the story in an open world environment with multiple detailed interiors.
  • Challenges and puzzles that will test your wit and courage.
  • Deep narrative and elements of psychological horror.
3105450.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
